message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 9 goals for the model.
Setting up all participants first: HR Portal as the main expanded process, and Employee, Direct Supervisor, and HR Department/HR Manager as external participants.

I’ll now model the full HR Portal process flow, including message interactions with the Employee, Supervisor, and HR Manager, with an event-based wait (supervisor response vs 5-day timer) and the escalation path.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 1 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…
I’ll fix the critical start-trigger issue by making the HR Portal start explicitly message-triggered (receiving the vacation request from the collapsed Employee pool).
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 5 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 1 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 2/3…
Fixing the critical BPMN issue: removing the incoming MessageFlow into the Message Start Event (the message start already represents the external trigger).
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 4 issue(s) — details below.
